cfa_selected_models: ChemML MLP (PyTorch); MapLight + GNN (CatBoost, Strict Parity)
cfa_best_per_workflow_notes: Conventional ML: Random forest (roc_auc=0.9070); ChemML deep learning: ChemML MLP (PyTorch) (roc_auc=0.8552); Chemprop v2: Chemprop v2 (AttentiveFP, ensemble=1) (roc_auc=0.8830); MapLight + GNN: MapLight + GNN (CatBoost, Strict Parity) (roc_auc=0.8759)

dataset_source: PyTDC Tox benchmark group: dili (official train_val/test split)
ensemble_members: Random forest, AdaBoost, CatBoost, Chemprop v2 (AttentiveFP, ensemble=1), CFA (Combinatorial Fusion)
ensemble_member_filter_notes: Dropped highly correlated members using overlap train predictions: MapLight + GNN (CatBoost, Strict Parity) (pair=Extra trees/MapLight + GNN (CatBoost, Strict Parity), corr=1.000); SVC (pair=SVC/Voting Classifier (KNN, SVM), corr=1.000); Voting Classifier (KNN, SVM) (pair=Extra trees/Voting Classifier (KNN, SVM), corr=1.000); HistGradientBoosting (pair=Extra trees/HistGradientBoosting, corr=1.000); Tabular MLP (pair=Extra trees/Tabular MLP, corr=1.000); ChemML MLP (PyTorch) (pair=Extra trees/ChemML MLP (PyTorch), corr=1.000); TabPFNClassifier (pair=Extra trees/TabPFNClassifier, corr=1.000); LogisticRegression (pair=LogisticRegression/Extra trees, corr=1.000); XGBoost (pair=XGBoost/CatBoost, corr=1.000); Extra trees (pair=Extra trees/CatBoost, corr=0.999); Chemprop v2 (AttentiveFP + Selected descriptors, ensemble=1) (pair=CatBoost/Chemprop v2 (AttentiveFP + Selected descriptors, ensemble=1), corr=0.999)
